name: stem_cell_clinic_overseas_cells_partner_hospital__a79540
premise: A biobank discovered samples were collected under an expired protocol version; IRB quorum cannot convene until tomorrow. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The trade is not abstract: it is truth versus loyalty under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.
